titleStmt.title: SII 9.359: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 359. (A.R. No. 102 of 1927.) ON A ROCK NEAR THE TANK ON THE TOP OF THE HILL FORT AT KUNDURPI, KALYANADRUG TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and is dated ≈öaka 1262, the other details being lost. It registers the excavation of a tank called Ha·πÅpeya-Do·πáe in Kundurupe by Chikka Bommayya-NƒÅyaka, son of Ga·πÖgeya-NƒÅyaka of Holakal, in the reign of the Hoysa·∏∑a king Vƒ´ra-BallƒÅ·∏∑a (III), son of Vƒ´ra-Narasi·πÖga, ruling from D≈çrasamudra. Bommaya-NƒÅyaka is stated to have been governing Nidugalla-rƒÅjya.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
